implement.note: TWO commits per brief pair, each regression-test-FIRST: F16 honest-completion gate (assertProgress seam: entrypoint-vs-scaffold-baseline git diff + scaffold output fingerprint + orphan-HTML; BUILD_UNFULFILLED terminal; BUILD_SYSTEM_PROMPT steering) and F28 request-fulfilment verification (request threaded into both VerifyRunInput copies; scaffold-DOM => FAIL; ran+failed => VERIFY_FAILED terminal; not-run stays note-only)

test.detail: full workspace suite green post-fix: shared 32, api 961 passed/1 skipped (114 files, +14 tests), web 113. Committed regression tests prove EACH gate alone fails a scaffold build (F16-alone with verify passing; F28-alone with assertProgress clean), plain-HTML apps stay valid, the credential-skip not-run still completes note-only, and the request reaches buildPrompt with the mandatory ordered scaffold check. assertProgress exercised over the REAL pipeline (esbuild + git) in build-mechanics.test.ts

adversarialReview.evidence: reviewer independently ran the two suites (25 tests exit 0), gate:chokepoint exit 0, api typecheck exit 0, verified module direction greps, the diagram elements, the anonymise path for the new system prompt, the zombie-net/finalizeOnce interaction, and the shared job-event code-as-free-string schema. Two non-blocking observations recorded (marker false-positive theoretical; finishError-vs-gate artifact-status asymmetry, judged defensible)

codexSliceReview.detail: feature profile: codex-slice runs only on security-boundary slices (S1/S4/S6/S7); S2 is not one

adversarialTest.detail: api slice: per-slice independent test replaced by the batched run-level API pass (Part 8.2), owed before the terminal verdict

video.verification: cast self-verified by content grep: 'Tests  25 passed' + named gate tests present

j3Probe.detail: FLOW_PLAN allows deferring the live J3 probe to S7's boot (meter-aware). Additionally blocked NOW: boot-b requires the dedicated Cortex account credential (~/.config/ekoa/claude-credentials.json) the operator has not yet provisioned - the local Claude Code token is no longer used (operator directive, commit 16172b8). Recorded; J3 runs at S7 boot once provisioned
